title: Breaking the Cycle
original_title: อำนาจ ศรัทธา อนาคต
overview: A group of young politicians campaigning against an authoritarian constitution speak up, spark hope and ignite a once-in-a-generation movement in this energetic exploration of the recent elections in Thailand.
